name: BioCardia, Inc.
summary: BioCardia, Inc. is a clinical-stage company developing cellular and cell-derived therapeutics for cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases. Its CardiAMP autologous mononuclear cell therapy platform targets ischemic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) and refractory angina from chronic myocardial ischemia. Its allogeneic mesenchymal stem cell (MSC) platform targets ischemic inflammatory HFrEF and ARDS. Products are enabled by the Helix transendocardial biotherapeutic delivery system for minimally invasive catheter-based intramyocardial delivery.
